comments.body:
<!-- dignified-code-simplifier-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-24 18:58:25 PT

Found 0 violations across all files. Code follows dignified Python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL before path operations - All uses of `.exists()` and `.read_text()` follow LBYL pattern
✅ Pathlib usage - All path operations use `pathlib.Path`, never `os.path`
✅ Encoding specification - All `.read_text()` and `.write_text()` calls specify `encoding="utf-8"`
✅ Import organization - All imports at module level, no inline imports, absolute imports only
✅ Exception handling - Proper boundary handling in `_load_prompt()` with `FileNotFoundError`
✅ Simple ternaries - Acceptable use in `raw_output = result.output or ""`
✅ Indentation depth - All code within 4-level limit
✅ Object construction - No invalid states allowed

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/cli.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/prompts.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/resources/erk_system_prompt.md`: 0 violations (documentation)
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/runner.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/slack_handlers.py`: 0 violations (string updates)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/integration/test_app_mention_integration.py`: 0 violations (test updates)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_cli.py`: 0 violations (test updates)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_prompts.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_runner.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_slack_handlers.py`: 0 violations (test updates)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-24 18:58:25 PT**: No violations detected. Code consistently applies LBYL, pathlib, encoding, and import standards.

</details>

<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-24 18:58:17 PT

All violations from previous reviews have been resolved. Current diff is compliant with dignified Python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - No violations found (proper exists() checks in prompts.py:36, 56)
✅ Path operations (.exists() before .read_text()) - Compliant
✅ Absolute imports - All imports absolute, no relative imports
✅ Module-level imports - All imports at module level (tempfile moved from inline to module level)
✅ Keyword-only parameters - get_erk_system_prompt() properly uses * separator (line 45)
✅ Frozen dataclasses - No dataclasses in this PR
✅ Default parameter values - None found
✅ Path encoding parameters - All .read_text()/.write_text() calls specify encoding="utf-8"
✅ Subprocess handling - No subprocess operations in this PR
✅ File operations - Proper path validation before operations

### Violations Summary
No violations found. All code changes conform to dignified Python standards.

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/cli.py`: ✅ Compliant (import added)
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/prompts.py`: ✅ Compliant (LBYL, encoding, keyword-only args)
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/resources/erk_system_prompt.md`: N/A (non-Python)
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/runner.py`: ✅ Compliant (simplified output handling)
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/slack_handlers.py`: ✅ Compliant (string updates only)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/integration/test_app_mention_integration.py`: ✅ Compliant
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_cli.py`: ✅ Compliant (mock patches)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_prompts.py`: ✅ Compliant (imports at module level, encoding correct)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_runner.py`: ✅ Compliant
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_slack_handlers.py`: ✅ Compliant

### Key Observations
- Previous violations (inline imports in test_prompts.py, missing encoding) have been resolved
- New prompts.py module demonstrates excellent LBYL pattern usage
- get_erk_system_prompt() correctly uses keyword-only parameter syntax
- All path operations properly specify encoding="utf-8"
- Test code properly uses module-level imports throughout
- No backwards compatibility hacks or re-exports present

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-24 18:58:17 PT**: Final review confirms all violations resolved - comprehensive re-check of diff passes all dignified Python standards
- **2026-02-24 18:47:02 PT**: All violations resolved - comprehensive review confirms compliance across all 8 modified files
- **2026-02-24 18:31:59 PT**: Found 3 violations across 1 file. Inline comments posted for each.

</details>

comments.body:
<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-24 18:58:17 PT

All violations resolved. No issues found in latest commit.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- **adding monkeypatch or @patch to a test** [pattern: `@patch|monkeypatch\.`] → loaded [Monkeypatch Elimination Checklist](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/master/docs/learned/testing/monkeypatch-elimination-checklist.md)
- **Path operations without LBYL** → dignified-python conventions (universal tripwires)

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` - None found
✅ `monkeypatch\.setattr.*Path\.home|monkeypatch.*subprocess\.run` - None found
✅ `@patch|monkeypatch\.` - Found in test files (valid exception applies)

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ **subprocess calls** - None found
✅ **time/datetime imports** - None found
✅ **os.chdir() calls** - None found
✅ **Path operations without LBYL** - All resolved (exists() checks added)

### Violations Summary
No violations. All previous issues resolved in commit a5e7e6cb8:
- ✅ Added LBYL exists() check before read_text() in _load_prompt() (prompts.py:9-11)
- ✅ Added encoding="utf-8" to all Path read/write operations
- ✅ @patch usage has valid exception (standalone package with explicit NOTE comment)

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/cli.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/prompts.py`: 0 violations (previously 1, now resolved)
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/resources/erk_system_prompt.md`: 0 violations (documentation)
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/runner.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/src/erkbot/slack_handlers.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/tests/integration/test_app_mention_integration.py`: 0 violations (exception applies)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_cli.py`: 0 violations (exception applies)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_prompts.py`: 0 violations (exception applies)
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_runner.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erkbot/tests/test_slack_handlers.py`: 0 violations (exception applies)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-24 18:58:17 PT**: All violations resolved. Verified LBYL checks, encoding parameters, and valid @patch exceptions.
- **2026-02-24 18:46:47 PT**: All violations resolved. Verified LBYL checks, encoding parameters, and valid @patch exceptions.
- **2026-02-24 18:32:15 PT**: Found 1 violation (missing LBYL check in prompts.py:9 before reading bundled resource)
- **2026-02-24 18:19:21 PT**: No violations detected. Found @patch usage in erkbot tests with valid exception (standalone package testing third-party Slack SDK).

</details>
